Current Controls: Contract questionnaire, basic multifactor authentication attestation
Human Control Weakness: Security review fatigue, evidence accepted without validation
Evidence Needed: Current SOC 2 report, access review, logging sample, incident notification clause

Human Control Weakness: Procurement owns renewal, Security owns review, no one owns expiration tracking
Evidence Needed: Updated supplier assessment, penetration test summary, encryption evidence

Current Controls: Single sign on, role based access
Human Control Weakness: Managers rubber stamp access approvals during busy periods
Legacy tokens not tracked after migration
Evidence Needed: API key inventory, token age report
Admin access review, log retention evidence, exception register

Human Control Weakness: Contractor offboarding is manual and delayed
Evidence Needed: Joiner mover leaver sample, termination evidence

Human Control Weakness: Incident routing unclear during legal escalation
Executive pressure discourages delays to reporting integrations
Evidence Needed: Data flow diagram, access scope validation
